purpose: Introduce the overall history of AI development, covering its vision, key eras, and foundational milestones from the 1950s to present day.

Explore the origins of AI including symbolic AI, foundational milestones, the rise and practical value of expert systems, the causes of two AI winters, and the landmark event of Deep Blue defeating Kasparov.

indexes.section: 寒冬与复苏：专家系统时代

purpose: Describe the paradigm shift brought by machine learning from 1997 to 2012, highlighting key technical breakthroughs and landmark applications driven by data.

indexes.section: 机器学习崛起：数据驱动的范式转移 (1997-2012)
subsections: 机器学习范式革命概览

purpose: Cover the deep learning revolution from 2012 to 2019, including the pivotal year of 2012, the hierarchical neural network architecture, and the major milestones of the golden age.

indexes.section: 深度学习革命：神经网络的全面胜利 (2012-2019)

purpose: Present the era of large language models from 2017 onwards, focusing on the Transformer architecture, exponential model growth, emergent capabilities, and future outlook toward general intelligence.

indexes.section: 大语言模型时代：通用智能的黎明 (2017-2026)
subsections: 模型规模的指数级增长
